axioms.name: MathLib_exp
axioms.boundary: Opaque model of PRBMath SD59x18.exp pending a Verity fixed-point exp primitive.
axioms.justification: The Reserve auction price-band case needs the function symbol to mirror upstream control flow; proofs consume only the separately listed algebraic property.

axioms.name: MathLib_exp_nonpositive_le_D18
axioms.boundary: Algebraic property of the PRBMath fixed-point exp boundary.
axioms.justification: For non-positive inputs, exp(x) is at most exp(0), represented as D18 in the fixed-point scale.

axioms.name: MathLib_ln
axioms.boundary: Opaque model of PRBMath UD60x18.ln pending a Verity fixed-point ln primitive.
axioms.justification: The value is used only to compute the decay rate inside the translated function and is treated as opaque by the benchmark proofs.
